/volumesc
zZList all volumes in a storage pool.
        Query string includes the pool name.

/volumec
Show details for a storage volume.
        Supports following query strings in url:
          /volume?path=/vms/aa/bb
          /volume?path=/vms/aa/bb&pool=poolname
